package.name: drone_rescue_ui_common
package.description: Shared UI/projection primitives used by both drone_rescue_dashboard (live operator view) and drone_rescue_mission_control (meta-mission launcher + analytics). Holds the MissionViewModel reducer, the operator-facing constants (task labels, severity colours, drone name lists), and the QoS profile factory so the two UI surfaces derive their state from one source instead of independently re-deriving it from wire-format messages.
